strengths: Deep full-stack expertise across TypeScript/Node.js and React, with direct experience in Nest.js (primary stack) and Kotlin/Java (secondary stack)
Strong track record in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, aligning with the role’s emphasis on emerging technologies
Proven ability to design scalable systems (e.g., GISCollective on Kubernetes, Direct Mail automation platform handling millions of operations)
concerns: Career gap from October 2025 to present, which may require additional context
Primary experience in Dlang and Ember.js, though recent roles (re:cinq, Optilyz) demonstrate strong TypeScript/Node.js proficiency
Limited explicit mention of testing frameworks like Vitest in recent roles, though testing expertise is implied by TDD practices at RIDE Capital
response.justification: Bogdan’s recent roles (re:cinq, Optilyz) demonstrate a strong fit for the Senior Fullstack Developer role, with deep TypeScript/Node.js and React experience, scalable system design, and direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure. His architectural contributions (e.g., GISCollective on Kubernetes) and customer-oriented delivery (Direct Mail automation platform) align closely with the job’s responsibilities, while his broader full-stack background in Kotlin/Java/Python and testing practices further strengthens his candidacy.
